comment_text.sn35.129:1.9: Adopt PTS reading rūpā ca upekkhāvedaniyā. MS manāpā here is surely a mistake.

root_text.sn35.129:1.1: Ekaṁ samayaṁ āyasmā ānando kosambiyaṁ viharati ghositārāme.
root_text.sn35.129:1.2: Atha kho ghosito gahapati yenāyasmā ānando tenupasaṅkami …pe… ekamantaṁ nisinno kho ghosito gahapati āyasmantaṁ ānandaṁ etadavoca:
root_text.sn35.129:1.4: Kittāvatā nu kho, bhante, dhātunānattaṁ vuttaṁ bhagavatā”ti?
root_text.sn35.129:1.5: “Saṁvijjati kho, gahapati, cakkhudhātu, rūpā ca manāpā, cakkhuviññāṇañca sukhavedaniyaṁ.
root_text.sn35.129:1.7: Saṁvijjati kho, gahapati, cakkhudhātu, rūpā ca amanāpā, cakkhuviññāṇañca dukkhavedaniyaṁ.
root_text.sn35.129:1.9: Saṁvijjati kho, gahapati, cakkhudhātu, rūpā ca manāpā upekkhāvedaniyā, cakkhuviññāṇañca adukkhamasukhavedaniyaṁ.
root_text.sn35.129:1.11: saṁvijjati kho, gahapati, jivhādhātu, rasā ca manāpā, jivhāviññāṇañca sukhavedaniyaṁ.
root_text.sn35.129:1.13: Saṁvijjati kho, gahapati, jivhādhātu, rasā ca amanāpā, jivhāviññāṇañca dukkhavedaniyaṁ.
root_text.sn35.129:1.15: Saṁvijjati kho, gahapati, jivhādhātu, rasā ca upekkhāvedaniyā, jivhāviññāṇañca adukkhamasukhavedaniyaṁ.
root_text.sn35.129:1.17: saṁvijjati kho, gahapati, manodhātu, dhammā ca manāpā, manoviññāṇañca sukhavedaniyaṁ.
root_text.sn35.129:1.19: Saṁvijjati kho, gahapati, manodhātu, dhammā ca amanāpā, manoviññāṇañca dukkhavedaniyaṁ.
root_text.sn35.129:1.21: Saṁvijjati kho, gahapati, manodhātu, dhammā ca upekkhāvedaniyā, manoviññāṇañca adukkhamasukhavedaniyaṁ.
root_text.sn35.129:1.23: Ettāvatā kho, gahapati, dhātunānattaṁ vuttaṁ bhagavatā”ti.

translation_text.sn35.129:1.1: At one time Venerable Ānanda was staying near Kosambī, in Ghosita’s Monastery.
translation_text.sn35.129:1.2: Then the householder Ghosita went up to Venerable Ānanda, and said to him:
translation_text.sn35.129:1.3: “Honorable Ānanda, they speak of ‘the diversity of elements’.
translation_text.sn35.129:1.4: In what way did the Buddha speak of the diversity of elements?”
translation_text.sn35.129:1.5: “Householder, the eye element is found, as are agreeable sights, and eye consciousness.
translation_text.sn35.129:1.6: Pleasant feeling arises dependent on a contact to be experienced as pleasant.
translation_text.sn35.129:1.7: The eye element is found, as are disagreeable sights, and eye consciousness.
translation_text.sn35.129:1.8: Painful feeling arises dependent on a contact to be experienced as painful.
translation_text.sn35.129:1.9: The eye element is found, as are sights that are a basis for equanimity, and eye consciousness.
translation_text.sn35.129:1.10: Neutral feeling arises dependent on a contact to be experienced as neutral.
translation_text.sn35.129:1.17: mind element is found, as are agreeable ideas, and mind consciousness.
translation_text.sn35.129:1.18: Pleasant feeling arises dependent on a contact to be experienced as pleasant.
translation_text.sn35.129:1.19: The mind element is found, as are disagreeable ideas, and mind consciousness.
translation_text.sn35.129:1.20: Painful feeling arises dependent on a contact to be experienced as painful.
translation_text.sn35.129:1.21: The mind element is found, as are ideas that are a basis for equanimity, and mind consciousness.
translation_text.sn35.129:1.22: Neutral feeling arises dependent on a contact to be experienced as neutral.
translation_text.sn35.129:1.23: This is how the Buddha spoke of the diversity of elements.”
